threats.title: North Korean Hackers Abuse VS Code Auto-Run Tasks to Deploy StoatWaffle Malware
threats.summary: The North Korean threat actors behind the Contagious Interview campaign, also tracked as WaterPlum, have been attributed to a malware family tracked as StoatWaffle that's distributed via malicious Microsoft Visual Studio Code (VS Code) projects. threats.title: We Found Eight Attack Vectors Inside AWS Bedrock. Here's What Attackers Can Do with Them
threats.summary: AWS Bedrock is Amazon's platform for building AI-powered applications. It gives developers access to foundation models and the tools to connect those models directly to enterprise data and systems.
